creator: support@ladylinux.com
text:
Hello,

This is a simple one .. The ImageMagick port has been unable to upgrade or load due to the version in ports not being avaliable on any ImageMagick download server or Mirror.

Latest Version

ftp://ftp.imagemagick.org/pub/ImageMagick/ImageMagick-6.2.8-8.tar.bz2

Non Existant Version That Is In Ports

ftp://ftp.imagemagick.org/pub/ImageMagick/ImageMagick-6.2.8-5.tar.bz2

This has been broke for at least a couple months now as far as I know.

Thanks,

Francesca

Fix: 

Update the Port to a version that exists.
How-To-Repeat: Freshen Ports

Try and install ImageMagick 

You will get this and finally a error and exit .. 

=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.imagemagick.org/pub/ImageMagick/.
fetch: ftp://ftp.imagemagick.org/pub/ImageMagick/ImageMagick-6.2.8-5.tar.bz2: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
